nasb.text: Of the birds after their kind, and of the animals after their kind, of every creeping thing of the ground after its kind, two of every kind will come to you to keep them alive.

esv.text: Of the birds according to their kinds, and of the animals according to their kinds, of every creeping thing of the ground, according to its kind, two of every sort shall come in to you to keep them alive.

cnv.text: 飛鳥各從其類，牲畜各從其類，地上所有爬行的動物，各從其類，每樣一對，都要到你那裡來，好保全生命。

ccb.text: 各种飞禽走兽和爬虫要按种类每样一对到你那里，好保住生命。

csbs.text: 飞鸟各从其类，牲畜各从其类，地上一切爬行之物各从其类，每样一对，都要来到你这里，好得以存活。
